generated_oml:
instance IncubatorTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for incubator temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance IncubatorTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for incubator temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance IncubatorTemperatureSensor3 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for incubator temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IncubatorTemperatureSensor1, IncubatorTemperatureSensor2, IncubatorTemperatureSensor3
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors transmitted via RabbitMQ"
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature data from incubator sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization, ThermalSimulationEnabler
]

instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with two parameters (C_air, G_box) assuming uniform air temperature and no heatbed heat accumulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization, ThermalSimulationEnabler
]

instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with four parameters (C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box) accounting for heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization, ThermalSimulationEnabler
]

instance RabbitMqBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker for transmitting sensor data to the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService, ThermalSimulationService, MonitoringService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService
]

instance ScipyOptimization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance ThermalSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Software for running dynamic thermal simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThermalSimulationService, MonitoringService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repository for source code management"
    DTDFVocab:enables SourceCodeManagementService
]

instance OneWireProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire communication protocol for temperature sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService, ThermalSimulationService, MonitoringService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService
]

instance ThermalSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal simulation for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalAdjustmentInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms for parameter estimation using non-linear least squares"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationAlert
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitoring for safety and optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalAdjustmentInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationAlert, AdjustParametersAction
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalAdjustmentInsight
]

instance SourceCodeManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Source code management and version control"
    DTDFVocab:provides SourceCodeVersionInsight
]

instance SafetyViolationAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert when temperature deviates beyond upper or lower limits"
]

instance OperationalAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitoring output that informs operational adjustments"
]

instance SourceCodeVersionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current version of source code for the digital twin"
]

instance AdjustParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust physical twin parameters based on safety violation alert"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance InsulatedBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated box for thermal incubator, 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed for thermal incubator, 214x214x3 mm, controlled via MOSFETs for 4A current"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan for thermal incubator, 12V/24V operation"
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for actuation control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for thermal incubator system"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system"
    base:contains InsulatedBox, Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPi4, PCB, PowerSupply
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed) sent from controller to low-level driver via RabbitMQ. Commands trigger actuation of MOSFET-controlled heatbed and fan through Raspberry Pi GPIO."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Synchronization occurs via RabbitMQ with periodic temperature data reading by the low-level driver; specific time intervals not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server (hosted on Raspberry Pi) orchestrates communication between low-level driver (PT interface), controller (control logic), and simulation models (DT). Data flows via RabbitMQ topics between PT components and DT services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, as the DT integrates models and data from the deployed physical system for ongoing monitoring and prediction."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model validation through uniform temperature experiments (testing Assumption 1), calibration using least squares minimization of residual error between model predictions and experimental data. Error analysis via sensor measurements at multiple positions."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ protocol for message-based communication between PT (low-level driver) and DT (controller, models). Raspberry Pi hosts RabbitMQ server for message routing."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All DT components (RabbitMQ server, controller, low-level driver) deployed on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B. Physical PT components connected via GPIO and PCB."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates safe protocol to maintain device safety during operation. Bang-bang controller prevents overheating by enforcing temperature limits (UL/LL) and controlled heating/waiting durations (H/C parameters)."
]
